'''Choba''' was a [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] torturer employed by [[Jib Kopatha]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Sheel Odala]] when she, together with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], attempted to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from Kopatha's [[Torture/Legends|torture]] room.

{{Char-stub}}
